# Agent Trust Gate™

Pre-action clearing for AI agents before they access data, spend money, call tools, or trigger external actions.

## What it does
Describes a local pre-action clearing pattern with fake-agent review, receipts, evidence, replay, and human approval.

## Currently available
- local_fake_agent_sandbox_demo
- pre_action_intent_check
- entitlement_check
- allow_deny_approval_gate
- refusal_signal_awareness
- receipt_generation
- receipt_verification
- evidence_bundle
- replay_runner
- readiness_scoring
- manual_approval_queue
- machine_readable_discovery_files
- quantum_readiness_positioning_only

## Disabled
- public_api
- live_endpoint
- real_external_agents
- real_customer_data
- real_payment
- billing
- settlement
- machine_to_machine_live_fee
- autonomous_action_execution
- tool_execution
- email_sending
- message_sending
- scraping
- internet_search
- tracking
- analytics
- deployment
- publishing
- production_integration
- quantum_security_claim
- post_quantum_compliance_claim
- ML_KEM_implementation
- ML_DSA_implementation
- SLH_DSA_implementation

## Interpretation
This pack is local discovery metadata only. It is not a callable service.

## Human approval
Gareth approval is required before publishing or live agent access.

## Quantum readiness
Positioning only: future inventory and PQC migration awareness. Not quantum secure, post-quantum compliant, NIST certified, or a production cryptographic implementation.

No production API or live endpoint exists. No legal, compliance, audit, security, or quantum certification is claimed.

## Static discovery files
Agent card, offer, technical review, capabilities, disabled capabilities, pilot manifest, human approval policy, pricing metadata, launch boundaries, and quantum-readiness positioning are available as static files.

## Private pilot route
A fake-agent private pilot may be reviewed only after Gareth approval. No production API or live endpoint exists.
